channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10292] parallel-scale-nfsv3: FAIL: setup nfs failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/c73d6b90-d469-11e7-8027-52540065bddc.

This is a SLES12 SP3 only issue. server and client are all running as SLES12 SP3. Looks like the same as LU-6690

while umount  /mnt/lustre 2>&1 | grep -q busy; do
    echo /mnt/lustre is still busy, wait one second && sleep 1;
done;
fi
Stopping client onyx-44vm9 /mnt/lustre opts:
Stopping client onyx-44vm10 /mnt/lustre opts:
Starting client: onyx-44vm12:  -o user_xattr,flock onyx-44vm12@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-44vm12 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-44vm12 mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock onyx-44vm12@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-44vm12 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/mpi/gcc/openmpi/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/sbin:/root/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 4 
onyx-44vm12: onyx-44vm12: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all 4
Exporting Lustre filesystem...
CMD: onyx-44vm12,onyx-44vm10,onyx-44vm9 grep -q rpc_pipefs' ' /proc/mounts ||        { mkdir -p /var/lib/nfs/rpc_pipefs &&         mount -t rpc_pipefs sunrpc /var/lib/nfs/rpc_pipefs; }
CMD: onyx-44vm12 chkconfig --list nfsserver > /dev/null 2>&1 &&
				 service nfsserver restart ||
				 service nfs restart
CMD: onyx-44vm10,onyx-44vm9 chkconfig --list rpcidmapd 2>/dev/null |
			       grep -q rpcidmapd && service rpcidmapd restart ||
			       true
CMD: onyx-44vm12 exportfs -o rw,async,no_root_squash *:/mnt/lustre         && exportfs -v
/mnt/lustre   	<world>(rw,async,wdelay,no_root_squash,no_subtree_check,sec=sys,rw,no_root_squash,no_all_squash)

Mounting NFS clients (version 3)...
CMD: onyx-44vm10,onyx-44vm9 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: onyx-44vm10,onyx-44vm9 mount -t nfs -o nfsvers=3,async 			onyx-44vm12:/mnt/lustre /mnt/lustre
onyx-44vm10: mount.nfs: requested NFS version or transport protocol is not supported
onyx-44vm9: mount.nfs: requested NFS version or transport protocol is not supported
 parallel-scale-nfsv3 : @@@@@@ FAIL: setup nfs failed!

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: This is a duplicate of LU-9892.
